verifier.py checks the max depth using abs(agent_max_depth - gt_max_depth) <= 0.5.

privileged_info_summary: Analysis of the SampleDivesV2.ssrf logbook file confirms there are exactly 12 dives in the year 2011. The maximum depth reached across all 2011 dives is 46.48 meters (from dive #90 on 2011-09-30). Agents must record 12 dives and a max depth around 46.5m (+/- 0.5m) to pass.
